wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

Q25412373 vs Q1777856
Račí potok / Raczyna - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q78166774 vs Q62073490
Martes Sport - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(7636219180)['brand:wikidata'='Q78166774']['brand:wikipedia'='pl:Martes Sport']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect - for brand prefixed tags']

way(995146418)['operator:wikidata'='Q7119525']['operator:wikipedia'='pl:PKP Energetyka']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

way(531965348)['subject:wikidata'='Q587']['subject:wikipedia'='pl:Wszystkich Świętych']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
network:wikidata and network:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for taxon prefixed tags
taxon:wikidata and taxon:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because taxon:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q147939 vs (missing) article redirects from pl:Złotokap zwyczajny to pl:Złotokap pospolity
an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(6326910632)['taxon:wikidata'='Q147939']['taxon:wikipedia'='pl:Złotokap zwyczajny']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for taxon prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags
species:wikidata and species:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because species:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q147939 vs (missing) article redirects from pl:Złotokap zwyczajny to pl:Złotokap pospolity
an affected OSM element that may be improved

[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(1802111005)['species:wikidata'='Q147939']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Złotokap zwyczajny']; node(5866335615)['species:wikidata'='Q726']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Koń']; node(6100762866)['species:wikidata'='Q549418']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Kłęk amerykański']; node(7797251787)['species:wikidata'='Q93208']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Emu zwyczajne']; node(7797267272)['species:wikidata'='Q93208']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Emu zwyczajne']; node(7797267273)['species:wikidata'='Q19707']['species:wikipedia'='pl:Osioł']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for parish prefixed tags
parish:wikidata and parish:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because parish:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name prefixed tags
name:wikidata and name:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because name:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q5484338 vs (missing) article redirects from pl:Franciszek Wielopolski (1658–1732) to pl:Franciszek Wielopolski (zm. 1732)
Dąb Franciszek - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q243427 vs (missing) article redirects from pl:Święty Wojciech to pl:Wojciech Sławnikowic
Kościół pw. Świętego Wojciecha i Niepokalanego Poczęcia Najświętszej Maryi Panny - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Kościół pw. Matki Bożej Nieustającej Pomocy i Świętego Floriana - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Kościół pw. św. Wojciecha i M. B. Częstochowskiej - an affected OSM element that may be improved
